channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/15)
channel.description: 嘿，今天简直是 AI Agent 开发者的“装备更新日”！GitHub Trending 上冒出来一堆新工具，都在解决同一个核心问题：**如何给 AI 装上更强大的“手脚”和“眼睛”**，让它能操作浏览器、连接外部服务、甚至管理自己的代码仓库。同时，关于 Claude Code 的讨论也特别热，大家好像都在寻找最佳实践。如果你在搞 AI 编程或者智能体，今天这几个项目绝对值得你花十分钟看看。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天简直是 AI Agent 开发者的“装备更新日”！GitHub Trending 上冒出来一堆新工具，都在解决同一个核心问题：**如何给 AI 装上更强大的“手脚”和“眼睛”**，让它能操作浏览器、连接外部服务、甚至管理自己的代码仓库。同时，关于 Claude Code 的讨论也特别热，大家好像都在寻找最佳实践。如果你在搞 AI 编程或者智能体，今天这几个项目绝对值得你花十分钟看看。

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 6 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Eng Manager, Release Manager and QA Engineer | 近期热门 | 总 10867 stars
item.author: garrytan

item.title: aiming-lab/MetaClaw
item.description: Just talk to your agent — it learns and EVOLVES. | 近期热门 | 总 1154 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open | 近期热门 | 总 1001 stars
item.author: pasky

item.title: knowsuchagency/mcp2cli
item.description: Turn any MCP, OpenAPI, or GraphQL server into a CLI — at runtime, with zero codegen | 近期热门 | 总 964 stars
item.author: knowsuchagency

item.title: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
item.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Claude Code skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation via Codex MCP | 近期热门 | 总 924 stars
item.author: wanshuiyin

item.title: Rohit24567/HyperLiquid-Claw
item.description: Trade smarter, not harder. Hyperliquid Claw gives your AI assistant full access to Hyperliquid DEX | 近期热门 | 总 447 stars
item.author: Rohit24567

item.title: vasilytrofimchuk/domainsearcher-app
item.description: Score and choose the best domain name for your startup — AI-powered generation, real-time availability, and multi-dimensional scoring (LEN, PRO, MEM, BRD, FIT). Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 414 stars
item.author: vasilytrofimchuk

item.title: KeyID-AI/agent-kit
item.description: Give Claude/Cursor email powers. 27 MCP tools — inbox, send, reply, contacts, search. Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 400 stars
item.author: KeyID-AI

item.title: epiral/agent-clip
item.description: AI Agent as a Pinix Clip — agentic loop with memory, tools, and vision | 近期热门 | 总 292 stars
item.author: epiral

item.title: jimuzhe/tiez-clipboard
item.description: TieZ 是一款基于 Tauri 的跨平台剪贴板管理器 / A cross-platform clipboard manager with history, tags, sync, privacy protection, and fast daily workflows. | 近期热门 | 总 224 stars
item.author: jimuzhe
